headers.//: Default for the SPA shell (served at every non-asset path via the rewrite): always revalidate so a deploy reaches returning users immediately. Firebase applies the LAST matching rule, so the specific asset/media rules below override this for their paths.
Content-hashed JS/CSS bundles never change for a given URL — cache forever.
Static media (card art, mascots, fonts) is stable per filename — cache long, revalidate on deploy.
